name: extract-json
description: Extract structured JSON from natural language text according to a user-defined field schema.

text.description: The natural language text to extract information from.

fields.description: Schema describing the fields to extract.

name.description: Field name (will be the key in the output JSON).

description.description: What this field represents, to guide extraction.

extracted.description: Extracted key-value pairs matching the requested fields.

missing.description: Field names that could not be found in the text.

errors.message: Input does not conform to the schema.
Model output does not conform to the schema.
